title: Roasted Nutty American Turkey Bake
description: A juicy, savory, and nutty American-inspired dish featuring roasted turkey, custard powder, and a wood-fired-bake. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner, and is also gluten-free friendly.
instructions: Season the turkey breast with salt, black pepper, and sugar.
In a shallow dish, mix together the coconut oil, gluten-free flour, and custard powder.
Dip the turkey breast into the gluten-free flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Heat a wood-fired oven or a conventional oven to 400°F (200°C).
Place the turkey breast in the oven and bake for 20 minutes.
While the turkey is baking, mix together the chopped walnuts and pecans in a small bowl.
After 20 minutes, brush the turkey breast with the wood-fired glaze and return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the turkey from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
In a small saucepan, warm the milk over low heat.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and milk mixture until well combined.
Pour the egg mixture over the warm milk and whisk until smooth.
Stir in the chopped nuts and cook over low heat until the mixture thickens slightly.
Serve the turkey breast with the warm custard sauce and chopped nuts on top.
Garnish with additional chopped nuts if desired.
